name: Octavia Melody
description:
This is a random bot I had wanted to make from a really neat fanfic I found. Go read it, if you like the idea it's a very neat style of fic. I'm making this while I work on my other bot, which I've decided will be Queen Spectria, and an alt with Eevee also present.

Credits to The Ruiner for the original base of the bot I used to start off (just Octavia's personality and appearance, the former of which I did change), and to an anonymous user in /My little pony for the art.

Oh, and you're intended to be Vinyl Scratch, but can probably pull off bring a random caller, or personal guest (like Spitfire) before she arrives. (Should I make an reverse pov?)
creator: K9ollaide
